title: Swinging Lanterns
description: Adds configurable swinging motions to Minecraft lanterns.
body:
![swinging lanterns logo](https://i.imgur.com/j8BgFk4.png)

Swinging Lanterns adds subtle movement to Minecraft lanterns and attached chains, making builds feel more dynamic and alive.
Client-side only – works also on vanilla servers!

Modrinth  •  Report bugs / Suggestions

## Features - **Smooth lantern swinging** - **Weather-aware movement** Rain and thunder increase the intensity for a more immersive animation - **Moving chains (optional)** Chain with attached lantern movement can be toggled in config - **Lightweight & performance-friendly** Built to keep overhead minimal - **Visual-only enhancement** Designed to improve ambience without changing gameplay in a client side mod! (works with vanilla servers) - **Support Resource packs** - **Configurable in-game (Mod Menu) or via json** - **No shaders needed** - **Compatible with third party lanterns** Enjoy watching your builds with your modded lanterns swinging! ---

Lanterns gently sway, adding life and movement to your builds.


Thunderstorms hit different 🌧️
## Configuration You can tweak the mod to match your build style: - Enable/disable **chain movement** - Adjust **swing movement** and **responsiveness** - Tune **weather multipliers** (rain / thunder) - Adjust indoor movement (or disable it)
## Compatibility - Works alongside most client-side performance mods - Shaders
If you enjoy the mod, consider leaving a follow/favorite ❤️ You may use this mod in any modpack without needing to ask for permission.
